rows.label: qev011703_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Hm? Who are you? Do you
have some business with me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0002
rows.name: Oh...? Wait... Are you Miia?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0003
rows.name:
A-Ahaha... H-Hello,
Walter-kyoukan............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0004
rows.name:
It's been a while. I received
the report that you crossed
over to the continent, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0005
rows.name: But... Well, how should I put this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0006
rows.name:
You smell... quite a bit. I want to praise
you for coming to report first instead of
taking care of your personal grooming, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0007
rows.name: E... Eeeeeh?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0008
rows.name:
Uwaaah, I'm sorry... That's right...
I wasn't able to take a bath the entire
time I was captured............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0009
rows.name:
It was tough at first, but eventually
I started getting used to my own
beast-like smell............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0010
rows.name:
Uwaaah, this is bad! As a subordinate standing
before my instructor... No, as a woman?! Or
rather, as a civilized person to begin with?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0011
rows.name:
I feel like I've lost something crucial~
Uwaah, uwaah. I'm so, so sorry~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0012
rows.name: Heh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0013
rows.name: It seems you've gained some experience.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0014
rows.name:
You seem to have found the guts to get
covered in mud... And the look in your
eyes is different from before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0015
rows.name: R... Really...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'd very much like to hear your
stories. The details of exactly
how you honed those skills.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0017
rows.name:
Kyoukan... I'll submit a
report on that later.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0018
rows.name:
And as for the other interesting
stories, I'll tell you all about
them directly another time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0019
rows.name:
But before that... There's something I
need to report first above all else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0020
rows.name: Oh... Let's hear it then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0021
rows.name: Yes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0022
rows.name:
I was captured in a stronghold used
by aliens within the Growth who
specialize in espionage activities...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0023
rows.name:
Using special technology, they copy the appearance of
other races, and can even replicate specific personalities,
including temperament and speech patterns.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0024
rows.name:
However, the physical copy is merely
a form of optical camouflage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0025
rows.name:
For example, if you touch them directly,
you'll immediately realize it's a fake form,
since their actual body hasn't transformed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0026
rows.name:
Also, the personality copy is just a
systematic recreation of patterns.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0027
rows.name:
This means the more information they gather on
personality, speech patterns, and lifestyle
habits, the higher the reproducibility, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0028
rows.name:
It's practically impossible to acquire absolutely
everything, especially highly diverse information
like the impressions they make on others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0029
rows.name:
It seems they extrapolate the personality based on
the range of information they have, and the artificially
constructed personality fills in the gaps.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0030
rows.name:
I see... So copying biological traits
and truly "becoming" that person are
two entirely different things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0031
rows.name:
Yes. So while their so-called
transformation ability is a threat,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0032
rows.name:
I deduce there are many ways to see
through it, such as direct contact or
exposing the temporary personality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0033
rows.name:
I was also able to prevent myself from
being replaced by a fake... all thanks
to the people who know me well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0034
rows.name: I see. You have good friends, Miia.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0035
rows.name: Not a friend. It's Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0036
rows.name: Heh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0037
rows.name:
Regardless, excellent work. The
information you brought back is something
other BLADEs were unable to obtain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0038
rows.name:
It is extremely valuable information
that will aid in the defense of
NLA. You should be proud.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0039
rows.name:
Oh no... It's all because
Senpai was there...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0040
rows.name:
I will report this to the higher-ups. Come
with me. As a reward for bringing back this
information, I will recommend you for BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0041
rows.name: Y... Yes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0042
rows.name:
Senpai! I... Thanks to you, Senpai, I
feel like my path has finally opened up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0043
rows.name:
Next time, let's work together!
As fellow... BLADEs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0044
rows.name: It's a promise, okay?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011703_MSG0045
rows.name:
We're definitely, absolutely
going together next time~![ST:wait ]
